languages.text: [Кивнуть Изимонду]"Блюстители непомерно уважают мнение губернатора, верно?"

languages.text: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"
languages.original_text: [Кивнуть Изимонду]"Блюстители непомерно уважают мнение губернатора, верно?"

traits.locale_text: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"

[Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"

languages.text: 【向伊西蒙德点头】“执法者对总督的意见极为尊重，不是吗？”
languages.original_text: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"

traits.locale_text: 【向伊西蒙德点头】“执法者对总督的意见极为尊重，不是吗？”

languages.text: [Adresser un signe de tête à Isimond] « Les prévôts ont un respect immense pour l'avis du gouverneur, je me trompe ? »
languages.original_text: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"

traits.locale_text: [Adresser un signe de tête à Isimond] « Les prévôts ont un respect immense pour l'avis du gouverneur, je me trompe ? »

languages.text: [Asentir hacia Isimond] «El personal de seguridad siente un gran respeto por la opinión de la gobernadora, ¿no es así?».
languages.original_text: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"

traits.locale_text: [Asentir hacia Isimond] «El personal de seguridad siente un gran respeto por la opinión de la gobernadora, ¿no es así?».

languages.text: [İsimond'a başını salla] "İnfazcılar, valinin görüşlerini epey bir saygı duyar."
languages.original_text: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"

languages.text: イシモンドに頷きながら「執事たちは、ご意見を過度に尊重しているのですね」
languages.original_text: [Nod to Isimond] "The enforcers have inordinate respect for the governor's opinion, do they not?"

traits.locale_text: イシモンドに頷きながら「執事たちは、ご意見を過度に尊重しているのですね」
